title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Built and maintained automated tests for APIs and frontend flows using Playwright and TypeScript, contributing to a suite of 3000+ API tests and 200+ E2E tests.
Developed an internal platform to centralize test execution, reporting, and coverage across services, used to manage and monitor daily test runs.
Enabled automated scheduling of test runs and reporting, improving visibility and reducing manual effort across teams.
Automated critical end-to-end user journeys, increasing test coverage and helping prevent production issues.
Integrated test suites into CI/CD pipelines to ensure continuous validation on each deployment, with tests running daily and maintaining consistently high pass rates.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Worked on QA automation for a FinTech virtual wallet platform.
Developed automated test suites for backend APIs.
Integrated automated tests into CI/CD pipelines to support continuous delivery.
